legacy_lexicon: the ivy on the north face

default_binding.AP2_NAME: the ivy on the north face

slots.meaning: The lone teen protagonist making the ascent.
slots.guidance: A single, capable-but-not-reckless climber; solo, no companion in this skeleton.

slots.meaning: The proper name of the whole cursed tower.
slots.guidance: A bare proper noun (no article); reused as an attributive modifier ('the cursed {TOWER}', '{TOWER} base', '{TOWER} heart').

slots.meaning: The single convergence point all four approaches lead to, before the four-tier ascent begins.
slots.guidance: A gate/hall-like threshold; always reachable, never itself hazardous.

slots.meaning: The dark, silent object of the whole quest (currently unlit; relighting it is the story's success condition).
slots.guidance: A bare noun naming the beacon/light-source; reused as '{GOAL} chamber', '{GOAL} mechanism'.

slots.meaning: The temporal frame that both permits and pressures the whole climb.
slots.guidance: A full noun phrase with its own article (e.g. 'the long night'); must read as ongoing and survivable, never itself a hazard.

slots.meaning: The mechanism atop the tower that receives the collected shards and relights the goal.
slots.guidance: A bare noun for the light-fitting/altar the shards are set into.

slots.meaning: The curse's personified presence; the recurring non-lethal antagonist at the summit.
slots.guidance: Never physically harms the hero; its worst effect is costing a shard or forcing a retreat, never injury.

slots.meaning: The abstract force behind the tower's hundred-year darkness.
slots.guidance: A bare noun; stays an atmospheric/narrative force, never a physical weapon or toxin.

slots.meaning: The collectible token gathered from three of the four tiers and needed to relight the crown.
slots.guidance: A bare singular noun; composed in templates as '{SHARD}s' for the plural.

slots.meaning: The tower's long-dead former lighthouse-keeper-analog figure, known through a log, bones, and keys.
slots.guidance: A bare noun for a past, non-present figure; never appears alive.

slots.meaning: The ignition energy released when the crown is lit.
slots.guidance: A bare noun; forcing it early causes a scattering setback, never an injury.

slots.meaning: The first of four approach routes from the tower base.
slots.guidance: A distinct, passable approach; distinguishable from the other three.

slots.meaning: The second approach route.
slots.guidance: Distinct from the other three approaches.

slots.meaning: The third approach route (forks into a dead end).
slots.guidance: Distinct from the other three approaches.

slots.meaning: The fourth approach route (itself a trap).
slots.guidance: Distinct from the other three approaches.

slots.meaning: The dead end at the bottom of route 3's downward fork.
slots.guidance: A survivable dead end (a flooded/blocked stop, not a fall or drowning risk); the retreat from it is always safe.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the setback from route 3's downward fork.
slots.guidance: Names a non-lethal turn-back.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the setback from route 4 being a trap.
slots.guidance: Names a non-lethal turn-back.

slots.meaning: The first tier's place name (water-themed).
slots.guidance: A distinct, self-contained area name; distinguishable from the other three tiers.

slots.meaning: The second tier's place name (mechanism-themed).
slots.guidance: Distinct from the other three tiers.

slots.meaning: The third tier's place name (archive/knowledge-themed).
slots.guidance: Distinct from the other three tiers.

slots.meaning: The fourth tier's place name (open-air/height-themed).
slots.guidance: Distinct from the other three tiers.

slots.meaning: The collectible shard found in tier U.
slots.guidance: A short noun phrase naming this tier's shard variant; distinguishable from the other two collectible shards.

slots.meaning: The collectible shard found in tier C.
slots.guidance: Distinguishable from the other two collectible shards.

slots.meaning: The collectible shard found in tier L.
slots.guidance: Distinguishable from the other two collectible shards.

slots.meaning: Tier U's commit-or-turn-back barrier obstacle.
slots.guidance: A retreatable mechanism; failing it never harms the hero, only costs the tier's shard/progress for tonight. Must be retreatable.

slots.meaning: Tier C's commit-or-turn-back barrier obstacle.
slots.guidance: A retreatable mechanism; must be retreatable.

slots.meaning: Tier L's commit-or-turn-back barrier obstacle (a guardian figure).
slots.guidance: Blocks passage but never attacks; a riddle/challenge, not a fight. Must be retreatable.

slots.meaning: Tier R's commit-or-turn-back barrier obstacle (a guardian figure).
slots.guidance: Blocks passage but never attacks; wakes and bars the stair, never harms. Must be retreatable.

slots.meaning: The hazard on tier C's direct route to its barrier.
slots.guidance: A navigable, non-lethal obstacle (timing/dexterity, not danger).

slots.meaning: The hazard on tier R's direct route to its barrier.
slots.guidance: A navigable, non-lethal obstacle; a damaged crossing, not a fatal drop.

slots.meaning: The dead-end side room off the tower gate.
slots.guidance: An enclosed, disused room; safe to enter and leave.

slots.meaning: Ending title: forcing the crown's spark too soon.
slots.guidance: Names a non-lethal setback.

slots.meaning: Ending title: bargaining a shard away to the shadow.
slots.guidance: Names a non-lethal setback.

slots.meaning: Ending title: jamming a shard while setting it blind.
slots.guidance: Names a non-lethal setback.

slots.meaning: Ending title: losing the moment while watching the shadow.
slots.guidance: Names a non-lethal setback.

slots.meaning: Ending title: bracing the doors, a partial/neutral outcome.
slots.guidance: Names a bittersweet but non-lethal discovery ending.

slots.meaning: Ending title: turning the crown the wrong way at the last moment.
slots.guidance: Names a non-lethal setback at the very top.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the success ending (nerve/cleverness route).
slots.guidance: Positive; a triumphant but non-graphic victory over the curse.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the completion ending (the keeper's true way).
slots.guidance: Positive; the beacon relit, the curse lifted.
